$schema: Maps docs MDX section anchors carrying a `<StabilityBadge level="stable" />` marker to the integration test that proves the behavior. Required for every Stable badge per [A0.1] in PRPs/sota-lifecycle-engine/03-plan-stage-0.md. Beta and Roadmap badges are not enforced. Section slugs are produced by the same slugify() in scripts/check-stability-mapping.ts (lowercase, alphanumerics + dashes, dots/underscores stripped).

mappings.test: lifecycle.integration.test.ts > Lifecycle verbs — full cycle (enroll → pause → resume → stop_drain → archive) > walks a campaign through every reachable status with audit events
lifecycle.integration.test.ts > Lifecycle verbs — full cycle (enroll → pause → resume → stop_drain → archive) > walks a campaign through every reachable status with audit events
lifecycle.integration.test.ts > Re-enrollment policy > policy='never' blocks 2nd trigger after enrollment completes
campaign.integration.test.ts > Campaign engine — email + wait + email > 3-step campaign for 5 contacts: email → wait 1s → email — both sends complete
mcp.test.ts > tool registration > registers exactly 27 tools (Stage 2 added 3 lifecycle.* verbs)
mcp.test.ts > pause_campaign (legacy → audited PATCH alias) > PATCHes /campaigns/:id with status=paused
mcp.test.ts > stop_campaign (lifecycle.*) > POST /campaigns/:id/stop with drain mode
mcp.test.ts > pause_campaign (legacy → audited PATCH alias) > PATCHes /campaigns/:id with status=paused
